content.full_text:
November 1, 2001

Monika Hudson
City of East Palo Alto
City Manager/City Clerk
2415 University Ave.
East Palo Alto, CA 94303

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-259

Dear Ms. Hudson:

This correspondence is written confirmation that you have requested, through the city attorney for East Palo Alto, that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") withdraw your October 26, 2001 request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹

Enclosed is a copy of Regulation 18329 for your information. Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William L. Williams, Jr.
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

WLW:jg
cc: Michael Lawson, City Attorney

Enclosure

1. Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
